title: A Broken Doll
writer: Lillian Ducey, Allan Dwan, Wilbur Hall
actors: Monte Blue, Mary Thurman, Mary Jane Irving
plot: Ranch hand Tommy Dawes has a special bond with little Rosemary, the crippled daughter of his boss Bill Nyall. When Tommy accidentally breaks Rosemary's favorite doll one day, he borrows a $20 gold piece from the foreman's mattress...
